summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MSY Limo Service website redesign. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with critical 'Made with Emergent' badge visibility issue and minor mobile menu duplication.

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge is still visible despite CSS hiding rules
ui_bugs.details: CSS hiding rules exist (lines 194-204) but are not effective

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu shows duplicate Book Now and Call Now buttons
ui_bugs.details: Mobile menu has 4 buttons instead of expected 2 (duplicated Book Now and Call Now)

passed_tests: Book Now and Call Now buttons functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Remove or properly hide 'Made with Emergent' badge from /app/frontend/public/index.html (lines 78-122). Current CSS hiding rules are ineffective. MEDIUM: Fix mobile menu duplicate buttons issue.
